# `docs/versions/` — Frozen prior drafts of the paper and blog

**What's in this folder:** Snapshots of earlier drafts kept for provenance. Do not edit these. If you want the canonical current draft, go to `docs/beyond_recall_v11_draft.md`.

## Contents

**Paper drafts (Markdown):**
- `beyond_recall_arxiv_draft.md` — the S105 baseline arXiv draft. Superseded.
- `beyond_recall_arxiv_v2_reframed.md` — earlier paper draft from the v2-reframe pass; kept as a historical reference for the earlier framing.
- `beyond_recall_v6_draft.md` — v6 working draft. Numbers stale. Do not cite directly.
- `beyond_recall_v7_draft.md` — v7 intermediate draft (§1 + §2 locked only). Superseded.

**Paper drafts (Word exports):**
- `beyond_recall_arxiv_draft.docx`, `beyond_recall_arxiv_draft_v2.docx` through `_v5.docx` — iterative Word exports from pre-v6 arXiv drafts, kept for provenance.
- `beyond_recall_v7_review.docx` + `beyond_recall_v7_review.clean.md` — v7 review working copies (Aarik annotated).
- `beyond_recall_review.docx` + `beyond_recall_review.clean.md` + `beyond_recall_review.html` — v6-era review artifacts.

**Blog posts:**
- `blog_post_v1_aarik_notes.md` — the author's annotated notes on the v1 blog post.
- `blog_post_v2_claude_draft.md` — Claude's draft of the v2 blog post (superseded by `docs/blog_post_v2.md` at the top of `docs/`).

**Subfolders:**
- `_pre_v11_drafts/` — v8, v9, v10-partial draft markdowns + docx exports + the v10.1 docx backup. Archived 2026-04-28 when v11 was release-frozen. v10.1 itself is preserved as the immediate-predecessor baseline at the top of `docs/`, alongside v11.
- `_latex_test_artifacts/` — LaTeX build intermediates (`beyond_recall_test.tex`, `.out`, `.pdf`, `.log`) from testing a PDF pipeline. Not load-bearing.

## How naming works here

Versioned files keep `v1`, `v2`, etc. suffixes. See `docs/FILE_NAMING.md` for the general convention: earlier versions are retained, not deleted, so provenance is preserved.

## Where these files come from / go to

These are snapshots. They feed nothing downstream; they exist so a reader can see how the prose evolved.

## Caveats worth knowing

- If any number here disagrees with `docs/DATA_REFERENCE.md`, the version here is stale. Use current drafts for citation.
- The canonical paper draft is `docs/beyond_recall_v11_draft.md`, not anything in this folder. The v10.1 preserved baseline lives alongside v11 at the top of `docs/`, not here.
